title: Hornet Removal in Cypress Hills, Brooklyn | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Cypress Hills, Brooklyn. Safe, effective nest elimination $350-$550. Licensed experts serving Cypress Hills. Call now!
intro: Hornets threatening your Cypress Hills property? Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, professional hornet removal services throughout this historic Brooklyn neighborhood. Our experienced technicians safely eliminate hornet nests from homes, businesses, and multi-family buildings across Cypress Hills, protecting your family and community.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Cypress Hills residents, we understand the unique pest challenges of this diverse Brooklyn community. Our licensed exterminators use safe, EPA-approved methods to remove hornet nests quickly while offering upfront pricing and same-day emergency service when available.
localContext: Cypress Hills' mix of pre-war apartment buildings, single-family homes near Highland Park, and tree-lined streets along Ridgewood border create ideal nesting spots for hornets in eaves, attics, and porches. The area's proximity to both Highland Park and Cypress Hills Cemetery means increased hornet activity during warmer months, making professional removal essential for resident safety.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Cypress Hills?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Cypress Hills locations. Emergency hornet removal is available for immediate threats, with most nests safely eliminated within 1-2 hours of arrival. We serve all areas of Cypress Hills including streets near Jamaica Avenue and the Highland Park border.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal price?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes full inspection, safe nest removal, treatment of surrounding areas to prevent return, disposal of the nest, and a follow-up warranty. Price varies based on nest size, location accessibility, and height. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before starting any work.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in Cypress Hills, Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Yes, Cypress Hills sees significant hornet activity, especially near Highland Park and wooded areas along the cemetery borders. The neighborhood's older housing stock with eaves, attics, and covered porches provides ideal nesting sites. Peak season runs from late spring through early fall, when hornets are most aggressive.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for children and pets in my Cypress Hills home?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and proven safety protocols to protect your family and pets during hornet removal. Our technicians are trained in safe application methods, and we advise residents to remain indoors during treatment. Most families can safely return to treated areas within 2-4 hours.
